stemHtml: A company claims safety is its main priority, but its practices prioritize efficiency. What does this indicate about the company?

options.a: The company has high resilience, so it focuses more on efficiency, reducing resources allocated to safety.
options.b: The company has low resilience, so it focuses more on efficiency, reducing resources allocated to safety.
options.c: This is a sign of national culture with high power distance.
options.d: In companies with low power distance culture there is balance between efficiency and safety.
